mapper.select:
SELECT id, event_id, plate_number, violation_type, location, speed_kmh, status, plate_image_base64, TO_CHAR(registered_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS registered_at FROM violations
ORDER BY registered_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, event_id, plate_number, violation_type, location, speed_kmh, status, plate_image_base64, TO_CHAR(registered_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS registered_at FROM violations WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO violations (event_id, plate_number, violation_type, location, speed_kmh, status, plate_image_base64) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{plateNumber}, #{violationType}, #{location}, #{speedKmh}, '대기중', #{plateImageBase64}) ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE violations SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
